questionHtml:
What is the electron domain geometry of Si in SiO2?

A.  bent

B.  linear

C.  square planar

D.  tetrahedral

meta.title: What is the electron domain geometry of Si in SiO2? A. bent B. linear C. square planar D. tetrahedral
